label: Outdoor Work
desc: How much the student wants to work outside or on physical job sites rather than at a desk.

label: Hands-On
desc: How much the student wants to physically manipulate objects in the real world vs. work behind a screen.

label: Risk / Edge
desc: Combined dimension: how much the student wants cutting-edge technology AND/OR physically dangerous high-stakes work. Negative = stable and safe.

label: Schooling
desc: How much formal education the student wants. Negative = trade school or right out of high school. Positive = bachelor's through PhD+.

label: Ethical Comfort
desc: How comfortable the student is working in industries that may cause indirect harm (defense, oil, finance, etc.).

label: Work Hours
desc: Tolerance for long, irregular, or unpredictable work schedules.
display_range: strict work-life balance ← → long hours fine

label: Impact
desc: How important it is to the student that their work visibly improves the world.

label: Creativity
desc: How much the student wants to invent and create novel solutions vs. execute proven, well-defined procedures.

label: Status / Money
desc: How important high salary and the social status that comes with income is to the student.

label: Coolness
desc: How important it is that strangers find the student's job impressive or exciting.

label: Teamwork
desc: Preference for collaborative team environments vs. independent solo work.

label: Extroversion
desc: MBTI E/I axis — extroversion side

label: Introversion
desc: MBTI E/I axis — introversion side

label: Sensing
desc: MBTI S/N axis — sensing side (concrete, practical)

label: Intuition
desc: MBTI S/N axis — intuition side (big picture, abstract)

label: Thinking
desc: MBTI T/F axis — thinking side (logic-driven)

label: Feeling
desc: MBTI T/F axis — feeling side (values-driven)

label: Judging
desc: MBTI J/P axis — judging side (structured, decisive)

label: Perceiving
desc: MBTI J/P axis — perceiving side (flexible, open)

label: Engineering Interest
desc: Expressed interest in physical engineering fields (mechanical, civil, aerospace, etc.)

label: CS Interest
desc: Expressed interest in software and computer science fields

label: Trades Interest
desc: Expressed interest in skilled trades (welding, carpentry, electrical, plumbing, etc.)

label: Electronics Interest
desc: Expressed interest in electronics, circuits, and embedded systems

label: Aerospace Interest
desc: Expressed interest in aerospace, aviation, and rocketry

label: Embedded Systems Interest
desc: Expressed interest in low-level programming and firmware

label: Travel Willingness
desc: Willingness to travel or work at remote locations — informational tag only, not directly scored

label: Materials Interest
desc: Expressed interest in materials science — informational tag only
